    68→  <files>.github/workflows/dotnet-test.yml, .github/workflows/release.yml, .github/workflows/container-images.yml</files>
    69→  <action>
    70→**dotnet-test.yml:**

    82→
    83→**container-images.yml:**

    93→</task>

    98→  <action>
    99→Update the `on.push` trigger in container-images.yml to add path filters so container builds only run when source code changes:
   100→
   101→```yaml
   102→on:
   103→  push:
   104→    branches: [master]
   105→    tags: ['v*.*.*']
   106→    paths:
   107→      - 'src/**'
   108→      - '.github/workflows/container-images.yml'
   109→      - '**/Dockerfile'
   110→      - '**/Directory.Build.props'
